title: Welcome to Wongo's
description:
“Welcome to Wongo’s. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.

“Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo’s,” they continue, without even looking up.
notes:
**Wongo Points** are a persistent currency tracked across all runs. Each purchase earns points: [gold]Bargain Bin[/gold] = [blue]32[/blue] points, [gold]Featured Item[/gold] = [blue]16[/blue] points, [gold]Mystery Box[/gold] = [blue]8[/blue] points. Accumulating [blue]2000[/blue] total Wongo Points rewards a [gold]Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge[/gold] relic. After every purchase, the clerk announces your current point total and how many remain until your next badge.

The [gold]Featured Item[/gold] is always a random [gold]Rare[/gold] relic eligible for shops, drawn before options are displayed, and its name is shown in the option text.

The [gold]Mystery Box[/gold] gives a [gold]Wongo's Mystery Ticket[/gold] relic, which delivers [blue]3[/blue] random relics after [blue]5[/blue] combats.

The [red]Leave[/red] option only downgrades an [blue]upgraded[/blue] card. If you have no upgraded cards, nothing happens.
